title: tectaria sabahensis
intro: Tectaria sabahensis, also known as the Sabah fern or Sabah tectaria, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Tectaria sabahensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Tectaria sabahensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or it can be dried and made into a powder for use in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tablets.
